docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GERALD R. BARRICK FILED RE: UNAVALIABLE ORIGINAL CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EASTMAN, BELINDA, EXECUTRIX OF THE ESTATE OF ARTHUR C. SHEETER, DECEASED
